title: Inorbit Malls is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Inorbit Malls is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Inorbit Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Inorbit Malls:
Inorbit Malls is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Inorbit Malls!
